problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
mechanism: Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating
hypothesis: Combining Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
